$schema: EastCondos spot-illustration manifest — single source of truth.
style: Modern Luxe hairline editorial line illustration: charcoal #1A1A2E strokes + small amber #D4A843 accents. 16:9, transparent PNG, max ~1600px wide.
usage: Website: <SpotGraphic name="..." variant="dark|light" />. Variant 'light' (cream strokes) on CHARCOAL backgrounds; 'dark' (charcoal) on cream.

spots.name: spot-journey
spots.label: The Journey
spots.description: HDB block on the left, dotted milestone path, condo tower on the right — the upgrade story.

spots.name: spot-eastcoast
spots.label: East Coast skyline
spots.description: Panorama of East-coast condo towers behind a calm coastline. Signature brand piece.

spots.name: spot-safety
spots.label: Safety Meter
spots.description: Shield with a checkmark + a gauge needle pointing to the safe zone (amber).

spots.name: spot-consultation
spots.label: Consultation
spots.description: Two chairs facing each other, overlapping speech bubbles (one with a house), notebook + pen.

spots.name: spot-nl-resale
spots.label: New launch vs Resale
spots.description: Two condo buildings on a balance scale — the real-cost comparison metaphor.

spots.name: spot-numbers
spots.label: Running the numbers
spots.description: Desk scene: calculator, documents with a line chart, amber magnifier, pen.
